response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song "Sweet Memories" and its writers from the on-screen text "Lyrics: 柊木雅 / Music: 大村雅朗". Searched for '"Sweet Memories" Seiko Matsuda Japanese and English lyrics'. 2. Identified song "フィナーレ" and its writers from the on-screen text "Lyrics: eill / Music: eill, Ryo LEFTY Miyata". Searched for '"フィナーレ" eill Japanese and English lyrics'. 3. Compiled all information and lyrics into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: A two-song medley performed by Kobo Kanaeru and Houshou Marine. The first song, "Sweet Memories," is performed by both, followed by "フィナーレ" (Finale) by Kobo Kanaeru.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru and Houshou Marine perform "Sweet Memories", with text in the bottom third indicating credits: Lyrics: 柊木雅 / Music: 大村雅朗.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
なつかしい痛みだわ
ずっと前に忘れていた
でもあなたを見たとき
時間だけが戻ったの
「幸福？」と聞かないで
嘘つくのは上手じゃない
友だちならいるけど
あんなには燃えあがれなくて
失った夢だけが
美しく見えるのはなぜかしら
過ぎ去った
やさしさも今は
Sweet memories
Sweet memories
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
This pain is nostalgic
I forgot it a long time ago, but
When I saw you,
Only time went back
Don't ask, “Are you happy?”
I'm not good at telling a lie
I have some friends, but
I'm now unable to become passionate like before
Why do only lost dreams look
So beautiful?
The kindness that has passed is now
Sweet memories
Sweet memories

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru performs "フィナーレ" (Finale), with text in the bottom third indicating credits: Lyrics: eill / Music: eill, Ryo LEFTY Miyata.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
君はほんとにわかってないよ
例えばハッピーエンドより
甘くて豪華なデザートより
君がいいんだよ
ふたつの傘より相合い傘
ちょっと冷たいけど
「愛するための」
代償ならいくらでもどうぞ
ただずっと側にいたい
ねえ ダーリン
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
You really don't understand it
For example, rather than a happy ending
Rather than a dessert sweeter and grander than this
I want you
Rather than an umbrella for two, an umbrella together
It's a little cold, but
If it's a price "to love,"
You can take as much as you want
I just want to be by your side forever
Hey darling
